Description

**The KL!N Dual Wash Mitt** is a gentle and safe tool for washing painted surfaces. It works well with your preferred shampoo. 

The mitt is 24x16cm (9.5"x6.5") in size and 3 inches thick. The super absorbent foam core holds a huge amount of wash solution, releasing it as you wash for swirl free washing.

The Dual Wash Mitt has a foldable cuff and a center opening. You can use it as a mitt or a pad, depending on your preference. This makes it the best of both worlds!

**Uses:**

- Washing Exterior Paint & Glass

**Care:**

**Hang dry after use (Do not leave wet in the bucket).**

We recommend using [Carbon Collective Restore Microfibre Wash](https://klin.co.uk/products/carbon-collective-restore-microfibre-wash), Specifically approved for use by KLiN Korea.

- Machine wash separately with a dedicated detergent and warm water. 

- Hang dry.

- Do not use Fabric Softener or Bleach.

- Always inspect any towel before it comes into contact with a surface.
